title: Eva spots the glitter at the tide line
prompt: Composition is anchored by @ep12-c3-papa-eva. Animate the still gently — every figure stays in their EXACT physical spot throughout the entire 10s. There are EXACTLY 2 people in the entire frame, no extras, no additional spawns. (BEAT 1 — 0-5s) Eva goes still all of a sudden, eyes locked wide on something glittering softly in the wet sand at the tide line, off-screen to her right. Eva keeps her right index finger gently pointing carefully toward the spot, mouth small in awe. Papa softly follows her gaze and squints curiously, head tilted slightly. The waves go soft and quiet for a hush moment. Eva (cheerful wide-eyed urgent stage-whisper): "Daddy... LOOK — something is shiny!" (BEAT 2 — 5-10s) Papa (warm soft curious tone): "...I see it too. Let's go check." Papa stays standing in the gentle surf with both feet planted on the sandy seabed, holding Eva safely steady. The water around Papa's legs stays calm and gentle. Calm cheerful kid-show ocean ambiance throughout — gentle wave swoosh, no scary intensity, no shouting. Preserve each character's silhouette and proportions throughout — no morphing, no shifting, no color drift on Papa's shorts or t-shirt or Eva's teal swimsuit.
